items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: Collapsible content sections with single or multiple open items

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: Terminal-inspired button with variants

items.name: avatar
items.title: Avatar
items.description: Terminal-inspired avatar with image support, monospace initials fallback, and group stacking with overflow.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: Terminal-styled badge for labels and status indicators

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: Terminal-styled text input

items.name: field
items.title: Field
items.description: Form field primitives for labels, controls, descriptions, and validation messages

items.name: textarea
items.title: Textarea
items.description: Terminal-styled multi-line text area

items.name: callout
items.title: Callout
items.description: Highlighted message block for tips, warnings, and errors

items.name: checkbox
items.title: Checkbox
items.description: Terminal-styled checkbox with bracket notation

items.name: icons
items.title: Icons
items.description: SVG icon components: directional chevron with rotation animation.

items.name: radio
items.title: Radio
items.description: Terminal-styled radio and radio group for single-selection with bracket notation

items.name: panel
items.title: Panel
items.description: Card-like container with composable header, title, description, content, row, and footer primitives

items.name: status-indicator
items.title: Status Indicator
items.description: Pulsing status dot with monospace label for terminal chrome

items.name: scroll-area
items.title: Scroll Area
items.description: Custom scrollable area with styled scrollbars

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: Simple bordered card primitives with floating border labels and semantic HTML support

items.name: block-bar
items.title: Block Bar
items.description: Segmented block-character bar for data visualization with multi-segment support

items.name: section-header
items.title: Section Header
items.description: Section heading with terminal-style decoration

items.name: empty-state
items.title: Empty State
items.description: Placeholder for empty content areas

items.name: key-value
items.title: Key Value
items.description: Compound component for labeled data display. KeyValue wraps KeyValue.Item rows in a semantic description list.

items.name: label
items.title: Label
items.description: Styled label with optional form control wrapping and orientation support.

items.name: overflow
items.title: Overflow
items.description: Container-aware overflow handling for items (dynamic fitting with indicator) and text (line clamping with tooltip).

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: Minimal tooltip with hover delay and terminal styling. Built on Popover primitive with all 4-side positioning. Compound API (Trigger + Content) or shorthand content prop.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: Modal dialog with compound components

items.name: kbd
items.title: Kbd
items.description: Keyboard shortcut indicator

items.name: divider
items.title: Divider
items.description: Line separator with horizontal and vertical orientation, default and spaced variants.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: Terminal-styled tabbed interface

items.name: menu
items.title: Menu
items.description: Terminal-styled selection list with keyboard navigation

items.name: navigation-list
items.title: Navigation List
items.description: Terminal-styled navigation sidebar list

items.name: toast
items.title: Toast
items.description: Terminal-styled toast notification system

items.name: stepper
items.title: Stepper
items.description: Step-by-step progress indicator

items.name: search-input
items.title: Search Input
items.description: Terminal-styled search input with / prefix and keyboard callbacks.

items.name: toggle-group
items.title: Toggle Group
items.description: Compound toggle button group for single selection with keyboard navigation

items.name: code-block
items.title: Code Block
items.description: Code display with three visual variants (hairline, bare, terminal), per-line diff/highlight states, and optional copy button. Add ui/code-block-highlight separately for lowlight syntax coloring.

items.name: diff-view
items.title: Diff View
items.description: Diff viewer with unified and side-by-side modes. Accepts unified diff strings or before/after text. Keyboard navigation between hunks with j/k.

items.name: horizontal-stepper
items.title: Horizontal Stepper
items.description: Horizontal step-by-step progress indicator

items.name: command-palette
items.title: Command Palette
items.description: Terminal-inspired command palette with search, keyboard navigation, grouped items, frame and density variants, and optional auto-coloring via the /highlight subpath

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: Searchable dropdown for single or multiple selection

items.name: spinner
items.title: Spinner
items.description: Terminal-inspired TUI spinner with four animation styles including a pixel snake, braille, dots, and pulse

items.name: sidebar
items.title: Sidebar
items.description: Compound sidebar navigation component

items.name: pager
items.title: Pager
items.description: Previous/next page navigation for sequential content

items.name: logo
items.title: Logo
items.description: Static text logo primitive. Precompute ASCII art and pass it as asciiText. Add ui/logo-figlet separately for runtime figlet rendering.

items.name: breadcrumbs
items.title: Breadcrumbs
items.description: Compound breadcrumb navigation with auto-separator and composable parts

items.name: toc
items.title: TOC
items.description: Headless-friendly table of contents primitives for section navigation

items.name: typography
items.title: Typography
items.description: Terminal-styled typography wrapper for consistent text styling

items.name: controllable-state
items.title: Controllable State
items.description: Controlled/uncontrolled state hook — manages value, defaultValue, and onChange for any component that supports both modes.

items.name: form-reset
items.title: Form Reset
items.description: Resets uncontrolled custom control state when a parent native form is reset.

items.name: floating-indicator
items.title: Floating Indicator
items.description: Measures the rect of an active child inside a container so a single sliding indicator (segmented pill, tab marker) can transform between siblings via ResizeObserver + MutationObserver.

items.name: active-heading
items.title: Active Heading
items.description: Configurable active heading detection for table of contents with top-line or viewport-center activation, optional bottom lock, and precise scrollTo offsets.

items.name: overflow-detection
items.title: Overflow Detection
items.description: Detects whether an element's content overflows its container using ResizeObserver. Supports horizontal, vertical, and both directions.

items.name: overflow-items
items.title: Overflow Items
items.description: Measures how many items fit in a container and tracks the overflow count. Uses ResizeObserver for automatic recalculation.

items.name: outside-click
items.title: Outside Click
items.description: Detect clicks outside a referenced element

items.name: presence
items.title: usePresence
items.description: Hook for animating mount/unmount transitions with CSS animations. Keeps element in DOM during exit animation, removes after completion.

items.name: theme
items.title: @diffgazer/ui Theme
items.description: Terminal-inspired theme variables and base styles

items.name: compose-refs
items.title: composeRefs
items.description: Utility to compose multiple React refs into a single ref callback. Use when a component needs an internal ref and must also forward an external ref prop (React 19 ref-as-prop pattern).

items.name: composed-refs
items.title: useComposedRefs
items.description: Cached companion to composeRefs: returns a stable RefCallback so React does not detach/re-attach the composed refs every commit. Use at component call sites instead of calling composeRefs inline during render.

items.name: copy-to-clipboard
items.title: useCopyToClipboard
items.description: Copy-to-clipboard state machine: writes text to the clipboard and exposes an idle → copied | failed status that resets after a delay (default 2000ms), with timer cleanup on unmount.

items.name: utils
items.title: Utilities
items.description: Shared cn() class-name merge utility (clsx + tailwind-merge).

items.name: selectable-collection
items.title: Selectable Collection
items.description: Shared selectable item collection and DOM-order utilities for compound selection components.

items.name: is-mobile
items.title: useIsMobile
items.description: matchMedia-backed hook that returns true when the viewport is narrower than a breakpoint (default 1024px).

items.name: floating-position
items.title: Floating Position
items.description: Positioning engine for floating elements with 4-side placement, flip, shift, and collision detection. Zero dependencies.

items.name: floating-panel
items.title: FloatingPanel
items.description: Headless floating surface primitive. Composes Portal, presence, and floating-position to render an anchored, animated panel with data-state, data-side, data-align, and data-positioned attributes plus a transform-origin custom property. Used by Popover, Select, and other anchored surfaces.

items.name: listbox
items.title: useListbox
items.description: Shared listbox state and keyboard navigation hook. Manages selection, highlight, and container ARIA props for listbox-pattern components.

items.name: popover
items.title: Popover
items.description: Floating content anchored to a trigger element. Supports click-to-open (popover) and hover (tooltip) modes with full 4-side positioning, flip, shift, and collision detection.

items.name: switch
items.title: Switch
items.description: Terminal-styled binary toggle switch

items.name: progress
items.title: Progress
items.description: Horizontal progress bar with determinate and indeterminate modes

items.name: skeleton
items.title: Skeleton
items.description: Loading placeholder with pulse animation
